title: Pithecellobium altissimum
taxonomy: Pithecellobium altissimum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It belongs to the genus Pithecellobium, a group of trees native to Central and South America. The plant is further classified under the subfamily Faboideae, which includes many legume species. Within the subfamily Faboideae, Pithecellobium altissimum is placed in the tribe Ingeae. The classification of Pithecellobium altissimum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the pea family.

intro: Pithecellobium altissimum, also known as the "Tree of Life," is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Caribbean and Central America.
